km.Ayrshire, Scotland: អេយរស៊ីរe, ស្កុតឡេន

zh.lifeSummary: Sir Riddell of Glengarnock於大約1220年出生在蘇格蘭艾斯爾。他和Lady Riddell of Glengarnock至少有1個女兒。他去世在他的家鄉。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Sir Riddell of Glengarnock于大约1220年出生在苏格兰艾斯爾。他和Lady Riddell of Glengarnock至少有1个女儿。他去世在他的家乡。

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese: Cheng, Jing, Kam Fung, Wai Shing, Wing, Yali, Yuk.
variant Romanization of the surnames 歐 and 區, see   Ou   1 and 2.

variants.name: Ou
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Wei, Ying, Ching, Heng, Hong, Jia, Kuang Yu, Li-Ching, Cho, Chong, Chung, Sa.  Southeast Asian Lichun, Ming, Quan, Roeun, Sokhom, Chau, Hai, Leang, Ly, Nhanh, Phan, Pho, Tha.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 歐, meaning ‘to sing someone's praise’ in ancient Chinese: (i) from the placename Dong Ou (東甌), a fief (in present-day Wenzhou in Zhejiang province) which was granted to Yao in 192  BC . It is said that Yao was a descendant of Wujiang (reigned 355–333  BC ), king of the state of Yue (located mainly in present-day Zhejiang and Jiangxi provinces) during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ). (ii) from the placename Ou Yu (歐餘), the name of a fief (located in present-day Zhejiang province) that was granted to Ti, the second son of Wujiang (reigned 355–333  BC ), king of the state of Yue (located mainly in present-day Zhejiang and Jiangxi provinces) during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ).

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 區, originally denoting an ancient vessel for measurement in ancient Chinese: from the personal name of Ou Zhizi (歐治子), an expert sword-maker who lived during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476 BC ). Some of his descendants inherited Ou (歐) as their surname, simplifying the Chinese character 歐 to 區.

nameMeanings.name: Riddell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish and northern English: variant of Riddle . A family of the name Riddell has been established in Whitton in Roxburghshire since the mid 12th century, when Walter de Riddel, from Rydale (North Yorkshire), settled in Scotland after accompanying King David. Another unrelated family of this name have been established in Northumberland since at least the 14th century, with William de Ridell having been sheriff of the county in 1314.

variants.name: Riddle
meanings: habitational name probably chiefly from Ryedale, a river valley in North Yorkshire. The placename derives from the river name Rye (of uncertain etymology) + Old Norse dalr ‘valley’. There are, however, other places called Rydale (in Westmorland for example) which could have given rise to hereditary surnames.
of Norman origin, from an Old French personal name Ridel, perhaps a pet form of ancient Germanic names such as Ridbald and Ridhari(us).

variants.name: Ridall
meanings: Scottish and English (Yorkshire and Lincolnshire): variant of   Riddell  .

variants.name: Riddel
meanings: Scottish and English: variant of   Riddell  ; see   Riddle  .

variants.name: Rydell
meanings: Swedish: ornamental name composed of the placename element ryd ‘woodland clearing’ + the suffix -ell, a derivative of the Latin adjectival ending -elius.
English: variant of   Riddell  ; see   Riddle  . This surname is now rare in Britain.

en.lifeSummary: Sir Riddell of Glengarnock was born about 1220, in Ayrshire, Scotland. He had at least 1 daughter with Lady Riddell of Glengarnock. He died in his hometown.

fr.lifeSummary: Sir Riddell of Glengarnock est né environ 1220, à Ayrshire, Écosse. Il a eu au moins 1 fille avec Lady Riddell of Glengarnock. Il est décédé dans sa ville natale.

de.lifeSummary: Sir Riddell of Glengarnock wurde um 1220 in Ayrshire, Scotland geboren. Er hatte mit Lady Riddell of Glengarnock mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Sir Riddell of Glengarnock è nato il circa 1220 nel Ayrshire, Scotland. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlia con Lady Riddell of Glengarnock. Morì nel sua cittadina.

ja.Ayrshire, Scotland: スコットランドエイルシュアイア
ja.lifeSummary: Sir Riddell of Glengarnockは約1220年にスコットランドエイルシュアイアで生まれた。彼はLady Riddell of Glengarnockとの間に少なくとも1人の娘をもうけた。彼は故郷で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Riddell of Glengarnock(은)는 대략 1220년 스컷랜드 에이르실르에서 태어났다. 그는 Lady Riddell of Glengarnock(와)과 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 그의 고향에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Sir Riddell of Glengarnock nasceu aproximadamente 1220, em Ayrshire, Scotland. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filha com Lady Riddell of Glengarnock. Ele faleceu em sua cidade natal.

ru.lifeSummary: Sir Riddell of Glengarnock родился около 1220 г. в местности аиршир, Шотландия. У него была по крайней мере 1 дочь от Lady Riddell of Glengarnock. Он умер в его родном городе.

es.lifeSummary: Sir Riddell of Glengarnock nació aproximadamente 1220, en Ayrshire, Scotland. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hija con Lady Riddell of Glengarnock. Murió en su pueblo.
